heroHeadline: Russia Kills Elderly Couple in Odesa Mass Strike; EU Adopts 20th Sanctions Package and €90B Ukraine Loan
heroSubtitle: Russia fired 107 Shahed drones and 2 ballistic missiles at Odesa overnight, killing an elderly married couple and striking a foreign merchant ship in the Black Sea corridor. The EU formally adopted its 20th Russia sanctions package and a €90 billion interest-free loan to Ukraine. President Zelensky attended the Cyprus informal EU summit — the first without Hungary's Orban — demanding full EU membership with a clear start date. Cumulative Russian losses now exceed 1.323 million. Ukraine confirmed Neptune missile strikes destroyed two production facilities at the Atlant Aero drone factory in Taganrog.
footerNote: Data sourced from UN OHCHR, ISW, CSIS, Ukrainian MoD, US DoD, NATO, IAEA, EU Council, and major news outlets including Reuters, BBC, AP, Al Jazeera, Bloomberg, Kyiv Independent, and Euronews. Casualty figures are estimates; Russia has never released official figures.
